calendar.matters:
UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Aug-22-2013 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-22-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald E Quidachay; Clerk: N. Bautista, Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff James Blanding is present.
Plaintiff is in Pro Per.
Defendant Tiffany Jackson is present.
Attorney, Dimitri Pikman representing the defendants through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Michael Lee , litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B , for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. The trial date of AUG-26, 2013 is vacated. (D501)

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-24-2013 Off Calendar
